refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and the operational context (agreed network conditions), ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant modules for operational awareness.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated network link with QoS prioritization for teleoperation data.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment of transmission parameters.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
Dependency on real-time monitoring data for adaptation.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates the communication quality control, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
Assumes error correction algorithms are compatible with vehicle and teleoperation modules.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP3) tightly with adaptive protocol to reduce latency and improve responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and communication stack responsible for teleoperation control and communication quality management.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data transmission.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send status and packet loss metrics to NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination but not focused on communication protocol specifics.
Receives telemetry but does not manage communication quality.
Primary module responsible for communication protocol and packet loss management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Teleoperation module should own the adaptive communication protocol DP to centralize communication quality management and minimize diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential coupling with Vehicle module for telemetry data may cause interface complexity.
Risk of duplicated communication logic if other modules implement partial communication handling.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and ownership boundaries between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules to avoid diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (adaptive communication protocol) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and is logically decoupled.

diffusion_risks: Possible interface complexity between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules for telemetry data exchange.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module has high containment score and low diffusion, indicating good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Teleoperation interfaces and network link testing.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP to Teleoperation IM with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface contracts between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules to reduce coupling.
Consider integration of real-time monitoring within Teleoperation to improve responsiveness.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a suitable DP, and assigns it to an appropriate IM with manageable risks and clear interfaces.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant modules for operational awareness.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Error correction and retransmission algorithms are compatible with system constraints.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules.
evidence_needed: Performance testing data showing packet loss under various network conditions.
Interface validation between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules.
